prompt: Orthographic exploded technical illustration of a stacked autonomous trading-agent module, three-quarter view. Eight thin circuit-board layers separated vertically with fine leader lines and numbered mono labels 01 sensor suite, 02 signal processor, 03 decision core, 04 policy module, 05 routing interface, 06 telemetry bus, 07 power watchdog, 08 chassis housing. dark brushed metal with faint emissive circuit traces. linework on a deep near-black ground #0E1412, a single mint-teal #3BE0C0 accent, softly rounded corners and smooth strokes, on-chain trading-terminal aesthetic; no colour except the one teal accent. the same austere technical register as Revenant but darker — an on-chain trading-terminal energy. Each number 01–08 appears exactly once, in order.
